ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Commedia rusticale. composta per lo Strafalcione della Congrega dei Rozzi
ItacWorkItem.Notes: Publication date according to British the Library Catalogue. The title page of the editions is reproduced here.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
